name: Arjay's Sand Springs Chili - Southern
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the salad oil until hot.
2. Add the beef cubes and brown on all sides. Remove and set aside.
3. Add the regular ground beef and crumble it in the pan, stirring to mix well.
4. Stir in the tomato sauce, tomato paste, one cup of water, vinegar, and all the dry ingredients (cornmeal, onions, spices) mixed together in a separate bowl.
5. Return the browned beef cubes to the pan and stir to combine.
6. Add the beer and stir until everything is well incorporated.
7. Simmer, covered, stirring occasionally for at least 2 hours. The chili can be prepared earlier in the day and kept on low heat so the spices have time to meld together.
8. If more water is needed, add it gradually.
9. Remove the cinnamon stick before serving.
